# Ben Lee Properties

> Ben Lee is Beverly Hills' top-ranked real estate broker and licensed attorney, specializing in Cheviot Hills, Beverlywood, and the greater Westside of Los Angeles. Over $1B in closed transactions. CalRE #01808926.

Ben Lee Properties is a boutique real estate brokerage based at 9454 Wilshire Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90212, with a second office at 11500 W Olympic Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90064. Ben Lee is a second-generation LA native, licensed attorney, and the top-producing broker at Beverly Hills' #1 office. His team includes Chief Marketing Officer Lilli Lee and transaction manager Joanna Sanchez.

Phone: (310) 704-6580
Email: ben@benleeproperties.com
Website: https://www.benleeproperties.com

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.benleeproperties.com/): Overview of Ben Lee Properties, featured listings, and market expertise.
- [About](https://www.benleeproperties.com/about): Bio, credentials, team, and professional background.
- [Current Listings](https://www.benleeproperties.com/current-listings): Active properties for sale and lease.
- [Sold Properties](https://www.benleeproperties.com/ben-lee-sold-properties): Track record of completed transactions.
- [For Buyers](https://www.benleeproperties.com/for-buyers-3): Buyer's guide, process, and resources.
- [For Sellers](https://www.benleeproperties.com/for-sellers): Seller's guide, marketing approach, and process.
- [Home Valuation](https://www.benleeproperties.com/valuation): Request a free market analysis.
- [Neighborhood Guide](https://www.benleeproperties.com/cities): Guides to Cheviot Hills, Beverlywood, Beverly Hills, Bel Air, Brentwood, Santa Monica, and surrounding Westside neighborhoods.
- [Newsletter / Market Updates](https://www.benleeproperties.com/blog): Monthly real estate market analysis delivered to over 9,000 Westside residences since 2012, covering home values, sales trends, and neighborhood news.
- [Testimonials](https://www.benleeproperties.com/testimonials): Client reviews and transaction stories.
- [Contact](https://www.benleeproperties.com/contact): Get in touch.

## Monthly Market Update Newsletter Archive

Ben Lee publishes a monthly newsletter with in-depth Westside real estate analysis. Each issue includes market data, neighborhood commentary, and personal insights from Ben. The newsletter has been published continuously since 2012 and is mailed to over 9,000 Westside households.

Recent issues:
- [May 2026](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/may-2026)
- [March 2026](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/march-2026)
- [February 2026](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/february-2026)
- [November 2025](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/november-2025)
- [October 2025](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/october-2025)
- [September 2025](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/september-2025)
- [August 2025](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/august-2025)
- [June 2025](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/june-2025)
- [May 2025](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/may-2025)
- [April 2025](https://www.benleeproperties.com/market-updates/april-2025)

Full archive: https://www.benleeproperties.com/blog

## Areas Served

Cheviot Hills, Beverlywood, Beverly Hills, West Los Angeles, Bel Air, Brentwood, Santa Monica, Westwood, Culver City, Mar Vista, Palisades.

## Credentials

- Licensed Real Estate Broker, California (CalRE #01808926)
- Licensed Attorney, State of California
- Top-producing broker, Beverly Hills' #1 office
- Over $1 billion in closed real estate transactions
- Monthly newsletter distributed to 9,000+ Westside households since 2012
- Member, National Association of REALTORS®
